name: Client Operating Model Phase 2 Build Object Truth Ingestion
outcome_goal: Extend existing Object Truth authority from inline evidence into client-system ingestion: system snapshots, sample capture, privacy-aware payload references, source metadata, replay fixtures, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not claim Object Truth is missing; use the existing substrate.
Do not store raw client payloads without explicit privacy classification and redaction policy.
Do not execute live connector writes.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; note docs requirements in the report.

jobs.label: phase_02_object_truth_ingestion_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 2 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_02_object_truth_ingestion/PLAN.md, treating the existing Object Truth implementation as authority. Extend it with bounded client-system ingestion primitives: system snapshot records, sample capture records, source query/cursor/window evidence, source metadata normalization, raw payload reference and redacted preview policy, replay fixtures, and readiness/read-model updates where needed. Use gateway/CQRS patterns and migration authority when adding operations or tables. Do not apply global schema backlog. Add focused deterministic tests and write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_02_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation evidence, live-registration needs if any, and blockers. Do not stage or commit.
